content_body:
Thank you so much for providing such a beautiful cabin to make long-lasting memories, such as, our boys (9 and 11) hiking by the river and along the railroad and laying coins on the tracks for souvenirs, and roasting marshmallows over a fire (kind of like camping with all the luxuries), and my husband and I renewing our wedding vows by the 2-story window - what a view!! It was great to finally use a CLEAN kitchen in a cabin! You would have never known others stayed here before. Hats off to the Cleaning Crew! The town of Blue Ridge should be grateful to people like you for making visitors want to come back and spend more money! I was inspired to write the following:


Humbled within this wondrous land,
For Fallen Timber, where dreams are planned.
River is rushing and leaves are falling,
My soul is free'd here by nature's calling.
Inspired by this vast array,
As star-filled nights fade to day.
To hear the train passing along the rails,
And to wander through the various trails.
A breathtaking view from windows in the treetops,
For just a moment, time will stop.
Being here within this beautiful land,
A dream of coming back is already planned.
title: Inspired Poem by Happy Guest in Blue Ridge, GA
